name: warranty-claim-processor-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Process and validate customer warranty claims by checking eligibility, detecting fraud signals, and generating claim decisions with resolution options.
author: genpark

claim.description: Claim details: product_id, purchase_date, claim_date, issue_description, proof_provided.

product.description: Product info: name, warranty_months, category, price.

resolution_options.description: Available resolution options for approved claims.
